name: Egg Drop Soup (Waring)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 quarts Chicken broth, or clear soup stock
2 tablespoons Cornstarch, mixed in with cold water
2 Eggs, slightly beaten with a fork
2 Scallions, chopped, including the green ends
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring soup stock to a boil.
2. Slowly pour in the cornstarch mixture while stirring the stock until the stock thickens.
3. Reduce heat so the stock just simmers.
4. Pour in the eggs slowly while stirring the soup.
5. As soon as the last bit of egg is incorporated, turn off the heat.
Serve with chopped scallions on top.
